productDisplayName: Doodle Kids Girl Printed Grey Skirt
description: Composition Grey skirt with a buttoned closure in the front, belt loops on the waist, a layered look with two frills at the hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Her cuteness level will be off the chart when you dress your little girl in this denim skirt from doodle. The floral fabric belt adds a colourful touch. Team this with a girly top and sandals.
